synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-3334 Important: Oracle Linux 8 freerdp security update
description:
[2:2.11.7-3]
- Backport several CVE fixes
  Resolves: RHEL-148825, RHEL-148865, RHEL-148982
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-3334

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-3334.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
freerdp-2.11.7-3.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
freerdp-devel-2.11.7-3.el8_10.i686.rpm
freerdp-devel-2.11.7-3.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
freerdp-libs-2.11.7-3.el8_10.i686.rpm
freerdp-libs-2.11.7-3.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
libwinpr-2.11.7-3.el8_10.i686.rpm
libwinpr-2.11.7-3.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
libwinpr-devel-2.11.7-3.el8_10.i686.rpm
libwinpr-devel-2.11.7-3.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
freerdp-2.11.7-3.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
freerdp-devel-2.11.7-3.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
freerdp-libs-2.11.7-3.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
libwinpr-2.11.7-3.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
libwinpr-devel-2.11.7-3.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/freerdp-2.11.7-3.el8_10.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2026-22855
CVE-2026-22858
CVE-2026-22859




Description of changes:

[2:2.11.7-3]
- Backport several CVE fixes
  Resolves: RHEL-148825, RHEL-148865, RHEL-148982
